name: staynex-backend
description: Backend MVP for Staynex, an AI WhatsApp assistant for hotels.

scripts.check:syntax: node --check src/server.js && node --check scripts/check-env.js && node --check scripts/test-message.js && node --check scripts/test-mock-ai.js && node --check scripts/test-knowledge.js && node --check scripts/test-knowledge-hotel.js && node --check scripts/test-memory.js && node --check scripts/test-guest-memory.js && node --check scripts/test-language.js && node --check scripts/test-pms-reservation.js && node --check scripts/test-reservation-token.js && node --check scripts/test-openai.js && node --check scripts/test-upsells.js && node --check scripts/test-automations.js
scripts.check:all: npm run check:syntax && npm run dashboard:build
